manifest.description: This table represents a shipment manifest, tracking all details related to an order's movement through the warehouse and shipping logistics process.

manifestid.description: Unique identifier for a shipment in the Putaway and Picking processes.

manifeststatus.description: Current status of the shipment process (e.g., SHIPPED, CANCELLED, PRINTED).

comments.description: Contains comments or notes related to the shipment. Values may be null.

postuserid.description: User ID associated with a post action in the database. Values may be null.

postdate.description: Timestamp when the post action was performed. Null values indicate missing data.

createdate.description: Timestamp of the record creation. No null values.

createuserid.description: User ID responsible for creating the record. Limited distinct values.

canceldate.description: Timestamp when a cancellation action was performed. High null percentage indicates infrequent cancellations.

canceluserid.description: User ID associated with a cancellation action. High null percentage indicates infrequent cancellations.

manifestsequence.description: Sequential number for tracking manifest records. All values are zero.

orderid.description: Unique identifier for an order, used as a reference in the database.

shipdate.description: Timestamp when the shipment was shipped. Some values may be null.

carrierid.description: Carrier ID associated with the shipment. Limited distinct values.

carrierserviceid.description: Service ID related to the carrier's service type. Multiple distinct values.

carrieracct.description: Account or identifier related to the carrier. String data with various codes.

servicelevel.description: Service quality level (e.g., PACKAGE, LTL). Only two distinct values.

unitssent.description: Number of units sent in a shipment. Null values indicate missing data.

packagessent.description: Number of packages sent in a shipment. Null values indicate missing data.

palletssent.description: Number of pallets sent in a shipment. Null values indicate missing data.

batchjobdate.description: Timestamp indicating when a batch was dispatched.

ismailsent.description: Flag indicating if an item has been sent via mail.

istrackfilemove.description: Flag indicating if a file has been tracked during movement.

nooflabels.description: Counts the number of labels associated with a shipment.

packingqty.description: Quantity of items packed in each batch.

uom.description: Unit of measurement used for tracking quantities (e.g., Carton, Unit).

Islabelreprint.description: Flag indicating if a label has been recreated or printed.

packtype.description: Type of packaging used during shipping processes (e.g., Carton, Pallet).

repack.description: Quantity of items repacked during storage or handling processes.

repalletized.description: Flag indicating if pallets have been repackaged.

totalpalletpick.description: Total number of pallets picked up from storage.

totalcartonpick.description: Total number of cartons picked up from storage.

invoiceno.description: Invoice number used to track incoming shipments or movements.

bandingqty.description: Quantity of banding material used on packages for protection.

totalunitpick.description: Total number of units picked up from storage during processes.

modifieduserid.description: Unique identifier tracking changes made by users in the system.

modifieddate.description: Timestamp indicating when a change was last made to an entry.

is_qb_moved.description: Flag indicating if an item has been moved within the QB system.

quickbase_id.description: The quickbase_id represents optional shipment references stored as numeric identifiers within a float64 data type. It is primarily used for linking manifest data with corresponding entries in QuickBase, such as order or carrier information, but it is not consistently populated.
